title: pavonia aspera
intro: Pavonia aspera, also known as rough rosemallow, is a plant species that belongs to the mallow family (Malvaceae) and is native to the Americas. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Pavonia aspera include the potential treatment of wounds, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its use as a diuretic and anti-ulcer agent. Herbal preparations of Pavonia aspera can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
